title: Why Paccar Is A Better Investment In The Trucking Industry Than Tesla
text: Paccar is one of the largest manufacturers of semi-trucks in the world.

title: AJR Trucking and MDB Transportation Place Largest Kenworth EV Order to Date
text: LOS ANGELES--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Kenworth Truck Company announced today that Jack Khudikyan, owner of AJR Trucking and MDB Transportation, has ordered 15 Kenworth T680E and 10 Kenworth K270E battery electric vehicles from Inland Kenworth – Montebello. It marks the largest Kenworth battery electric vehicle order placed to date. title: ABB, PACCAR Collaborate To Provide Advanced Charging Solutions For Trucks
text: ABB Ltd (NYSE: ABB) partners with PACCAR Inc (NASDAQ: PCAR) to provide PACCAR dealers and customers with a range of advanced charging solutions (up to 350 kW) across fleet operations in North America and Europe. Financial terms not disclosed.

title: F, CMI & MTOR Quarterly Earnings on Feb 3: What to Expect
text: Per the latest Earnings Trend report, the auto sector Q4 earnings are likely to grow 6.1% y/y. Read on to know the factors likely to have shaped Ford (F), Cummins (CMI) and Meritor's (MTOR) earnings.
